TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Corie_Blount, title = Corie_Blount, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Corie_Blount} }

S.FORM: Corie Blount nalecuhan i Monrovia, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corie Blount i 1993 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 25, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 1 bulad 4 demiad, 1969 a mihca, Corie Blount, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶ori…ô br~…æount nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i monro*ia, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ori…ô br~…æount i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ori…ô br~…æount, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Corie Blount nalecuhan i Monrovia, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corie Blount i 1993 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 25, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 1 bulad 4 demiad, 1969 a mihca, Corie Blount, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶ori…ô br~…æount nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i monro*ia, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ori…ô br~…æount i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ori…ô br~…æount, miunduaj.
